sections.subtitle: Current Form Analysis
sections.text: Espanyol have been struggling, losing their last 3 matches and failing to win in their last 4. Barcelona, on the other hand, are in strong form, with high-scoring games (over 2.5 goals in last 5) despite not keeping a clean sheet in their recent matches.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Barcelona have dominated Espanyol in recent encounters, remaining unbeaten in the last 12 head-to-head matches. In the last two meetings, Barcelona scored 7 goals against Espanyol's 3, showcasing their attacking superiority.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Barcelona lead the league with 95 goals scored and a strong offensive line including players like Lewandowski and Raphinha. Espanyol, ranked 16th, have struggled defensively, conceding 47 goals and showing poor ball possession (39.5%).

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Injuries
sections.text: Barcelona's attacking trio of Lewandowski, Raphinha, and Lamine Yamal are in excellent form, though they miss key defenders like Koundé. Espanyol rely on Javi Puado for goals but lack depth due to injuries and inconsistent performances.
